title: Spine Slot Animation Recipe Controls
description: Bounded numerical controls the compiler accepts. All numeric fields are optional and default to 1.0. Unknown fields fail compilation by design.

recipe_type.description: Which recipe family the controls apply to. Defaults to hp_symbol when omitted.

export_profile.description: Target Spine timeline contract. v10_linear is accepted only by the legacy proof compiler and is rejected by the portable builder; omit entirely for default 4.3 linear output. Use spine_43_bezier only when intentionally opting into numeric Bezier arrays on supported numeric timelines. spine_42_bezier is accepted as a legacy alias.

bezier_preset.description: Optional preset for export_profile=spine_43_bezier. The compiler expands the preset to numeric absolute handle arrays; it never emits named curve strings.

bounce_strength.description: Scales symbol land y-impact and x squash/overshoot magnitude. Default 1.0.

land_duration_scale.description: Multiplies land settle key times and total duration. Default 1.0.

idle_duration_scale.description: Multiplies idle loop duration and nonzero idle key times. Default 1.0.

glow_intensity.description: Scales glow slot alpha when a glow slot exists. Default 1.0. No-op when glow slot is missing.

sparkle_intensity.description: Scales sparkle slot alpha when a sparkle slot exists. Default 1.0. No-op when sparkle slot is missing.

premium_intensity.description: Scales lit/glass alpha and combines with glow, sparkle, and win pulse strength. Default 1.0.

motion_strength.description: Scales pulse magnitude and combines with bounce_strength for land. Default 1.0.

feature_active_intensity.description: Scales smart/feature-active loop intensity for families that emit a smart loop (BO/SF/JP/SC). Default 1.0. No-op when the recipe has no smart loop.
